column2: §RWARNING: CPU-Heavy!§!\nEvery living character's §Yspecial CSH traits§! will be §Gupdated§! §Rimmediately§! (instead of the usual gradual updates throughout the year).
(CSH) Remove all traits and disable updates
Every living character's §Yspecial CSH traits§! will be §Gupdated§! at a random time once per year
Every living character will §Rstop§! having §Yspecial CSH traits§! added or updated
Every living character's §Yspecial CSH traits§! will be §Rremoved§!

column1: # Enable/disable trait visibility for me only

column2:
Since this is a §Ymultiplayer§! game where the host has decided to enable the §Yspecial CSH traits§!, you can decide to §Yhide§! all of those traits from your personal perspective.

Your preference to §Yhide§! the traits will be saved through most kinds of succession. (Abdication is a notable exception.)

Current setting: §MVISIBLE§!

You have chosen to §Yhide§! all of the §Yspecial CSH traits§! from your personal perspective. This decision allows you to reverse that choice, and §Yshow§! them again.

Your preference to §Yhide§! the traits will be saved through most kinds of succession. (Abdication is a notable exception.)

Current setting: §MHIDDEN§!
All §Yspecial CSH traits§! will be §Yhidden§!, from your personal perspective
All §Yspecial CSH traits§! will be §Yvisible§!, from your personal perspective
This modifier is used to track whether a character has chosen to hide all of the §Yspecial CSH traits§!.\n\nHowever, this modifier should normally be hidden - how are you reading this?!
